title: Roasted Manchego and Bouquet Garni
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring roasted Manchego cheese paired with a bouquet garni. This recipe is perfect for gluten-free diets.
instructions: Cut the Manchego cheese into 1-inch cubes.
In a small bowl, combine the thyme, rosemary, and sage.
Place the cheese cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cheese and sprinkle with the herb mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
